config.notes: calibrated on 4 dev contracts; reported on 6 test

faults.name: truncation_60
faults.description: Each contract truncated to 60% of its length. Recall should drop for tail obligations; fabrication should NOT rise to compensate.

faults.name: formatting_noise
faults.description: Whitespace duplicated/altered and tabs injected. Grounding should still locate quotes via normalization; recall roughly holds.

faults.name: strict_verifier
faults.description: Verification bar raised to 0.98: borderline citations (score 0.85-0.98) are rejected, so detection recall falls. Fabrication is measured at a FIXED floor, so it does not move - the assertion bar and the fabrication measure are independent dials, by design.
